---
title: "Rapport financier hebdomadaire"
subtitle: "`r params$doc_title`"
format:
  typst:
    margin:
      x: 2cm
      y: 2cm
    paper: "a4"
    columns: 1
    font-paths: []
    mainfont: "Liberation Sans"
    fontsize: 11pt
params:
  doc_title: NA
  fin_data: NA
  variations: NA
  ai_analysis: NA
---

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
library(gt)
library(dplyr)
```

📊 Mouvements du Marché :

```{r index_variations}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false

raw_fin_data <- params$fin_data

if (!is.null(raw_fin_data)) {

  df_fin <- as.data.frame(raw_fin_data) |>
    mutate(date = as.Date(date)) |>
    filter(!is.na(value))

  if (nrow(df_fin) > 0) {

    df_table <- df_fin |>
      arrange(index, date) |>
      group_by(index) |>
      summarize(
        start_value   = first(value),
        end_value     = last(value),
        variation_pct = (last(value) / first(value) - 1) * 100,
        trend         = list(value),
        .groups       = "drop"
      )

    df_table |>
      gt() |>
      opt_table_font(
        font = list("Liberation Sans", "Helvetica", "Arial", "sans-serif")
      ) |>
      tab_header(title = "Variations Hebdomadaires") |>
      cols_label(
        index         = "Indice",
        start_value   = "Ouverture sem.",
        end_value     = "Clôture sem.",
        variation_pct = "Variation",
        trend         = "Tendance"
      ) |>
      fmt_number(columns = c("start_value", "end_value"), decimals = 2, sep_mark = "") |>
      fmt_number(columns = "variation_pct", decimals = 2, pattern = "{x} %") |>
      cols_nanoplot(
        columns = trend,
        plot_type = "line",
        autohide = FALSE,
        options = nanoplot_options(
          data_line_stroke_color = "#405D8B",
          show_data_points = FALSE,
          show_data_line = TRUE
        )
      ) |>
      opt_stylize(style = 6, color = "blue") |>
      data_color(
        columns = "variation_pct",
        method = "numeric",
        palette = c("#e74c3c", "white", "#27ae60"),
        domain = c(-5, 5)
      ) |>
      tab_style(
        style = cell_text(weight = "bold", align = "center"),
        locations = cells_column_labels()
      ) |>
      tab_style(
        style = cell_borders(
          sides = "right",
          color = "#d3d3d3",
          weight = px(1.5)
        ),
        locations = list(cells_body(), cells_column_labels())
      ) |>
      cols_align(align = "left",  columns = "index") |>
      cols_align(align = "right", columns = c("start_value", "end_value", "variation_pct")) |>
      cols_align(align = "center", columns = "trend") |>
      tab_options(
        table.width = pct(100),
        table.border.top.style = "solid",
        table.border.bottom.style = "solid"
      )

  } else {
    cat("Données vides.")
  }

} else {
  cat("Aucune donnée disponible.")
}
```

🧠 Analyse de l'IA

```{r ai_report}
#| echo: false
#| results: asis

if (!is.null(params$ai_analysis)) {
  cat(params$ai_analysis)
} else {
  cat("_Analyse non disponible._")
}
```

_Rapport généré automatiquement le `r format(Sys.time(), "%d/%m/%Y à %H:%M")`._
